case_title: OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY, LLC. VS. LEO SULAIMAN et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UPON BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY,  LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT SULAIMAN, LEO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULAIMAN, LEO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 315 GONZALES DRIVE $1,550.00 RENT, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,550.00, TOTAL $3550.00. SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY,  LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT SULAIMAN, LEO ARIFIN, SULAIMAN AKA ARIFIN SALAIMAN VIRYLA, BUDIONO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (664.5 CCP) FILED BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ARIFIN, SULAIMAN AKA ARIFIN SALAIMAN VIRYLA, BUDIONO
DECLARATION OF JEFFREY MARGULIES UPON A BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLYMPIC VIEW REALTY,  LLC.
